---
title: "Lightweight structural graphs, and the entity-resolution trap"
description: "Cheap structural edges plus lightweight extracted content deliver most of the coverage; heavy content-graph engineering buys diminishing returns because entity resolution is fragile."
date: "2026-07-20"
categories: [retrieval]
draft: true
---

::: {.callout-note title="Status"}
**Design.** The intended approach, not yet implemented.
:::

**Thesis.** Cheap structural edges plus lightweight extracted content deliver most of the coverage; heavy content-graph engineering buys diminishing returns because entity resolution is fragile.

**Draws on.** Drawn from the wiki's Lightweight-Structural-Graphs and Graph-Comparison-Empirical.

## Outline

- 
- 
- 

_Stub. Expand from the seed page(s) above._
